description: Manifest of OpenBody minimum-core conformance vectors (SPEC §8.3). A conformance runner loads each file and checks the assertion for its `kind`. Starter batch — grows to the full §8.3 minimum-core list.
coverage_todo: each of the five WorkUnit.scoring kinds (reps/time/distance/continuous/energy)
a continuous-endurance record with measuredBy links
number canonicalization (72 vs 72.0 vs fixed-point) equivalence
